ValidationRule.description: Restrict user to create duplicate record
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
OR( AND( ISNEW(), ISBLANK(Name) = false, NOT(ISBLANK(Name)), ISNEW(), OR( VLOOKUP($ObjectType.Placement__c.Fields.Name, $ObjectType.Placement__c.Fields.Name, Name) <> Id ) ),
AND( ISCHANGED(Name), VLOOKUP($ObjectType.Placement__c.Fields.Name, $ObjectType.Placement__c.Fields.Name, Name) <> Id ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: "Duplicate Record" A record with this name already exists
